properties.title: NovaTech Solutions — Discovery Call
properties.summary: Initial discovery with Wei Ahmed. Identified pain points: manual coaching process, inconsistent messaging. Budget approved for Q1. Decision timeline: 6 weeks.

properties.title: NovaTech Solutions — Demo
properties.summary: Demo with Wei and CTO. Wei impressed with AI roleplay. CTO asked about security and HubSpot integration. Sent SOC 2 report and integration docs.

properties.title: NovaTech Solutions — Champion Call
properties.summary: Champion call with Wei. Confirmed CFO is economic buyer. CFO cares about ROI timeline, implementation disruption, integration with stack. Prepping CFO one-pager.

properties.title: DataFlow Inc — Discovery Call
properties.summary: Discovery with Priya Sharma. DataFlow scaling 15→40 reps. Main pain: 6-month ramp, 18% vs 35% close rate gap. Budget: $150-180K approved. SKO deadline: April 20.

properties.title: DataFlow Inc — Technical Deep-Dive
properties.summary: Technical deep-dive with Marcus Chen (CTO) and Priya. Covered: SOC 2, Salesforce integration, GDPR compliance, custom MEDDIC methodology. Marcus is now a champion. Next: CFO approval.

properties.title: DataFlow Inc — CFO Call
properties.summary: Jennifer (CFO) joined call. Concerned about implementation timeline and April SKO deadline. Committed to dedicated CSM and 2-week sprint. She wants guarantee in writing. Sent updated proposal with SLA.

properties.title: DataFlow Inc — Final Negotiation
properties.summary: Final negotiation with Priya and Marcus. Narrowed to us vs CompetitorBeta. Our differentiator: AI roleplay adaptation. They want custom success metrics dashboard. Decision expected by end of week.

properties.title: QuantumLeap AI — Intro Call
properties.summary: Intro call with Alex Rivera. 3-person sales team with inconsistent approaches. Main competitors: DataRobot, C3.ai. Struggle with competitive positioning and pricing confidence. Demo scheduled for 3/17.

properties.title: QuantumLeap AI — Demo for CEO & Team
properties.summary: Demo for Alex, Samantha (CEO), and 2 AEs. Focus: competitive positioning vs DataRobot, build vs buy, technical buyer personas, pricing confidence.

properties.title: Velocity Retail — Champion Transition
properties.summary: Call with Wei Kim (departing champion) to discuss deal closure strategy before she leaves March 31. Goal: close contract before transition to new contact Jake Martinez.

properties.title: CloudBridge Systems — CFO Intro (Pending)
properties.summary: Attempting to schedule CFO intro through David (champion). CFO pushed back on $72K — needs value justification. Goal: present ROI model and close MEDDIC gap on Economic Buyer.
